workflowOsSmokeWinPrereq0: Packaged FluxAlloy.exe (not npm run dev); scenario with a Process block saved.
workflowOsSmokeWinPrereq1: Watch folder on disk; interval 15–86400 s.
workflowOsSmokeWinPrereq2: Run scenario on detect enabled for auto ffmpeg.
workflowOsSmokeWinStep_planner_task: Service → Planner: watch-folder task, Windows Task Scheduler backend, enable after save.
workflowOsSmokeWinStep_drop_file: Drop a new media file into the watch folder (not a duplicate name from a prior run).
workflowOsSmokeWinStep_detect_run: Status bar: watch-folder event; with auto — workflowScenario row in processing history.
workflowOsSmokeWinStep_headless_tick: Close the UI, wait for the tick interval or run FluxAlloy.exe --workflow-watch-folder-tick.
workflowOsSmokeWinStep_url_scenario: (Optional) FFmpeg rail → Scenario → Run URL scenario (sourceUrl + yt-dlp → ffmpeg).
workflowOsSmokeWinPass0: No osSchedulerWarning on save (or a clear workflow log error).
workflowOsSmokeWinPass1: After tick, processing completes without crash; userData/logs has no secrets.
workflowOsSmokeMacPrereq0: FluxAlloy.app from pack:mac:dir; scenario with Process block.
workflowOsSmokeMacPrereq1: Watch folder on a local volume.
workflowOsSmokeMacStep_planner_task: Planner: macOS LaunchAgent backend, task enabled.
workflowOsSmokeMacStep_drop_file: New media file in the watch folder.
workflowOsSmokeMacStep_detect_run: Status bar event; workflowScenario history when auto-run is on.
workflowOsSmokeMacStep_headless_tick: Quit the app, wait for StartInterval or run FluxAlloy --workflow-watch-folder-tick from the bundle.
workflowOsSmokeMacStep_url_scenario: (Optional) URL scenario from the Scenario rail.
workflowOsSmokeMacPass0: plist is recreated when the interval changes without bootstrap errors.
workflowOsSmokeMacPass2: Disabling the task removes the plist and bootouts the agent.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxPrereq0: Packaged binary (pack:linux:dir); scenario with ffmpeg Process block.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxPrereq1: systemd --user available; watch folder on disk.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxStep_planner_task: Planner: Linux systemd user timer backend, task enabled.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxStep_verify_os: systemctl --user status fluxalloy-watch-<taskId>.timer active; units under ~/.config/systemd/user/.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxStep_drop_file: New media file in the watch folder.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxStep_detect_run: Status bar + workflowScenario history when auto-run is on.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxStep_headless_tick: Close the UI, wait for the timer or run ./fluxalloy --workflow-watch-folder-tick.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxPass0: daemon-reload and enable succeed (check workflow log).
workflowOsSmokeLinuxPass1: journalctl --user -u fluxalloy-watch-<taskId>.service has no fatal errors.
workflowOsSmokeLinuxPass2: Disabling the task removes timer units and disables the timer.
